meta.nazev: Písmeno T — oprav přesun na střed (backward 80 → 50)

cms.task_text: Svislý tah písmene T je mimo střed — [hlp]backward je 80 místo 50[/hlp]. Opravte.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
